Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?
Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? - React Redux: Redux and a Quick Start - (29)

This post kicks off a brand new chapter, but I'm only splitting it into two parts, so there's less to cover than usual. So what exactly is Redux? In this post we'll get to know it, and then walk through a quick start with React Redux and Redux Toolkit by converting our ToDoList over to Redux for state management.
